sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111112" key="filo/dakrus" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλό-δακρυς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">υ,</itype> gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">υος</itype>, <sense id="n111112.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loving tears, given to weeping,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:63" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.63</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:202" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.202</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
